title: Christmas Candle Holder, Black and Gold Tea Light Candle Holders Set of 3, Xmas Glass Candle Holders with Stag Christmas Tree, Votive Candle Holder for Christmas, Party Table Decorations
features: Package Includes: This set includes 3 black and gold votive candle holders, each measuring 7.2*7.8cm, perfect for tea light candles and creating a warm and inviting atmosphere for your home

Exquisite Designs: Adorned with delicate patterns of reindeer, Christmas trees, and snowflakes, these candle holders add a touch of festive charm to any space. The unique black and gold color scheme showcases your elegant taste

High-Quality Craftsmanship: Crafted from heat-resistant glass, these votive candle holders feature a sleek black exterior with a gold-plated interior reflects the candlelight beautifully, combining durability and elegance
Festive Ambiance: Light up these candle holders to instantly enhance the Christmas and New Year ambiance, creating a cozy and joyful atmosphere for your celebrations

Versatile Decoration: Perfect for Christmas, New Year, or simply adding a touch of elegance to your home decor. These candle holders are versatile and can be placed on mantles, dining tables, shelves, or any other desired location
